response.overview: The story tells of Jabar who in his youth married three women and divorced all his wives while they were pregnant. 50 years later, he begins to search for his children to correct his past mistakes. Jabar, who is increasingly ill and frail, wishes to divide his wealth. However, Jabar is shocked when he discovers that his children have the same facial features! Nevertheless, the meeting between Jabar and his children brings disaster and destruction to their families. Mohd Kasim was raised by his father Abdul Jabar as an only child. He is shocked when his father tells him about a secret that has been kept for 50 years. Abdul Jabar has children from three previous wives. Their names all begin with Abdul while he is Mohd, and moreover, the character of each of them is not as Mohd Kasim expected. Because Jabar does not have much time left to live, Abdul Jabar begins to think about dividing his inheritance. Robin and Hamidon have been instructed to find Somad, Hakim and Wasit.
response.title: 4 Abdul 1 Mohd
